evidence: STALE_0DTE produced only 4 trades and $145.8. Pullback fallback had 2 trades, $73.8, -26.1 worst MAE, and 156.93 PnL/exposure hour, while breakout/squeeze stale fallbacks had worse MAE and weaker efficiency.
name: Pullback-Only Stale 0DTE Fallback
risk: Small sample may overfit the stale-data slice and remove rare valid breakout/squeeze fallback winners.
trigger: 0DTE data is stale or unavailable and router uses no-0DTE fallback profiles.
validation_metric: Fallback PnL remains non-negative, fallback average/worst MAE improves, VALID_0DTE PnL is unchanged, total net profit stays above 98% of run_001, and PnL/exposure hour is flat or better.
